summary: Comprehensive E2E pipeline validation covering all 6 stages; fixed stale review artifact and added integration test DB cleanup

findings.description: Integration test conftest.py had no DB cleanup, leaving data that polluted subsequent test_database_integration.py runs
Stale review-issue-170.json artifact committed to branch but not on main
Overseer shadow log entries (Stage 2 requirement) are not explicitly asserted in tests — simulation runs with overseer_shadow=True but no test checks overseer_shadow_log table
